text.tspan: Week 2: data-tick-listener and scrip-master services enter parallel/canary mode
Week 4: data-tick-listener and scrip-master-cache fully decommissioned (first wins)
Week 6: 5 more services decommissioned (streamer, tick-producer, websocket-pull-api, cmots, data-consumer)
Week 8: feed-broadcast and scrip-master-service decommissioned (final shutdown)
